issues.description: Action type 'TrashFromHand' is incorrect. The card effect says 'you may trash 1 card from your hand' as a cost/condition, not a primary action. The primary action is 'Add up to 1 {Straw Hat Crew} type Character card...from your trash to your hand', which should use 'PlayFromHand' or a hand retrieval action targeting trash.
Action type 'SearchDeck' is incorrect. The effect retrieves from trash, not deck. Should use a trash-to-hand retrieval action (likely a custom action or 'PlayFromHand' with trash source).
Filter is incomplete/wrong. Must specify: type='{Straw Hat Crew}', kind='Character', cost≤4, and exclude '[Tony Tony Chopper]'.
Effect structure should reflect optional nature ('may trash'). Current structure doesn't capture the conditional trashing cost properly.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x1] [When Attacking] You may trash 1 card from your hand: Add up to 1 {Straw Hat Crew} type Character card other than [Tony Tony Chopper] with a cost of 4 or less from your trash to your hand.
